name: badge
source_code:
// src/components/ui/badge.tsx
import { ark } from '@ark-ui/react/factory'
import type { ComponentProps } from 'react'
import { styled } from 'styled-system/jsx'
import { badge } from 'styled-system/recipes'

export type BadgeProps = ComponentProps<typeof Badge>
export const Badge = styled(ark.div, badge)

visual_summary: badge is a badge UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable badge behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready badge component with the following characteristics:

Name: badge
Description: badge is a badge UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable badge behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: badge, parkui

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/ui/badge.tsx
import { ark } from '@ark-ui/react/factory'
import type { ComponentProps } from 'react'
import { styled } from 'styled-system/jsx'
import { badge } from 'styled-system/recipes'

export type BadgeProps = ComponentProps<typeof Badge>
export const Badge = styled(ark.div, badge)
